name: John Van Scoter
background: Mr. Van Scoter has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since June 2023. Prior to joining Solid Power, Mr. Van Scoter served as Vice President of SRI International, a nonprofit research institute, from 2019 to 2023. From 2010 to 2018, he was the CEO and President of eSolar, Inc., a concentrated solar power technology company. Earlier in his career, he spent over 25 years at Texas Instruments.

commpanies.name: Solid Power, Inc.
commpanies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
